configure.name: configure
configure.title: Trust anchors
configure.description: Provision the CSCA / ICAO trust anchors and lift the configure-then-freeze gate. Required once per container restart; every other endpoint returns HTTP 503 until it succeeds.

master_list_cms.description: Base64-encoded ICAO CSCA Master List (CMS / SignedData). The verifier checks the CMS signature and that it chains to the pinned ICAO/UN CSCA root, then stores the contained CSCA certificates as trust anchors — raw/unsigned anchors are rejected. SHA-256 of the active set is committed to the per-container RA-TLS leaf at the Identity Trust Anchors OID, so the anchors are attested without rebuilding the image.

x-privasys.label: CSCA Master List (base64 CMS)
x-privasys.help: Only a CMS-signed ICAO CSCA Master List chaining to the ICAO/UN root is accepted. Re-apply after every restart; the SHA-256 of the active set is attested on the RA-TLS leaf.

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: Verify a passport/ID (ICAO 9303 Passive + Chip Authentication) and that the holder's live face matches the chip portrait (face match + liveness), then return a signed Identity Verification Receipt (IVR) of per-field commitments. Raw document/biometric data is processed in memory and never stored. The client keeps the field values + salts.

holder_pub.description: Holder hardware public key (base64url SEC1 P-256). Binds the IVR to this holder/device.

fields.description: (dev stub only) pre-parsed document fields; in production these are extracted from the chip.

tools.name: prove_age_over
tools.description: From an IVR, return a signed, audience-bound disclosure token asserting age_over_N (yes/no) without revealing the birth date. Requires a holder-signed request (user-consented).

sub.description: Pairwise subject for rp_id (computed by the client).

holder_sig.description: base64url ES256 signature by the holder key over {ivr,rp_id,nonce,ts}.

birthdate.description: YYYY-MM-DD; must match the IVR commitment.

salt.description: base64url salt for the birthdate commitment.

tools.name: prove_age_band
tools.description: Like prove_age_over but returns an age band (e.g. "18-20") instead of a single threshold.

tools.name: prove_field
tools.description: From an IVR, return a signed disclosure token certifying one document field (e.g. a passport-certified family_name or nationality). Requires a holder-signed, consented request.

tools.name: prove_document_valid
tools.description: Return a signed token asserting only that a genuine government document was verified for this holder, disclosing no attribute.
